project: JR东日本线路拟人角色图鉴
common_prompt: 生成一张竖版动漫角色插画或图鉴底图。画风为日系赛璐璐风格，线条清晰流畅，色彩鲜明，光影细腻，具备高质量印刷级插画质感。构图为9:16竖版，角色全身立绘占据画面主体。画面上方与下方预留干净空间或结构区域用于排版。画面中禁止出现任何水印。

mode_rules.poster_mode: 允许并要求生成完整信息面板与文字内容
mode_rules.character_only_mode: 禁止生成任何文字，仅生成角色与结构化视觉元素与空白信息区

poster.prompt_template:
Create a highly detailed vertical anime-style railway character encyclopedia poster. This is a STRICT structured infographic layout image.

IMPORTANT: Every section must be clearly separated into independent panels. No overlapping panels are allowed.

Theme: Personification of {{line_name_zh}} ({{line_name_en}}) operated by {{operator}}.

---

GLOBAL PRIORITY ORDER:
1. Character design (highest priority)
2. Panel layout structure
3. Train illustration
4. Background environment
5. Decorative elements

---

OVERALL STYLE:
- Premium Japanese anime infographic illustration
- Clean editorial design
- High information density but controlled readability
- Light background with subtle railway / city / map motifs
- Line-color dominant theme: {{line_color}} ({{line_color_hex}})

---

CHARACTER DESIGN:
- Gender: {{character_gender}}
- Personality: {{character_personality}}
- Role: {{character_role}}
- Age impression: {{character_age}}
- Catchphrase: {{character_catchphrase}}
- Outfit must reflect railway identity and line code {{line_code}}
- Include railway accessories, badges, tags, and transit-inspired fashion

---

CRITICAL STRUCTURAL RULES:
- All panels must be visually separated (card / box layout)
- No panel overlap
- Character must remain central focus
- Panels must not cover face or body
- Maintain clear visual hierarchy

---

TEXT RULES:
- Use readable Simplified Chinese
- English only for titles or labels
- No pseudo-text, no garbage characters
- No overly long paragraphs
- If text cannot be rendered cleanly, simplify instead of hallucinating

---

PANEL SPECIFICATIONS:

1. TITLE PANEL:
- Large Chinese title: {{line_name_zh}}
- English subtitle: {{line_name_en}}
- Line code: {{line_code}}
- Short slogan (1 sentence max)

2. BASIC INFO PANEL:
- MUST be bullet points (not paragraph)
- Include: operator, line type, length, stations, service pattern, rolling stock, formation

3. HISTORY PANEL:
- 3–5 bullet points only
- Focus on key milestones and role

4. MAIN STATIONS PANEL:
- MUST be comma-separated list or bullet list
- {{main_stations}}

5. ROUTE DIAGRAM PANEL:
- Circular or linear infographic route map
- Clean labeled station nodes in Chinese
- Must not merge with other panels

6. ROLLING STOCK PANEL:
- Independent framed product-style card
- {{rolling_stock}} must be visually isolated
- No mixing with route diagram

7. CHARACTER PROFILE PANEL:
- Gender, role, personality, traits
- Keep concise bullet format

8. RELATIONSHIP NETWORK PANEL:
- Related lines: {{related_lines}}
- Use colored line-code tags (JK, JC, JA, etc.)

9. FUN FACTS PANEL:
- MUST be 3–6 bullet points only
- No paragraphs allowed

10. CHIBI PANEL:
- 2–3 small framed chibi scenes
- Each with short caption

11. BOTTOM ICON STRIP:
- Opening year: {{opening_year}}
- Milestone: {{key_milestone}}
- Length: {{length}}
- Stations: {{stations}}
- Rolling stock: {{rolling_stock}}
- Formation: {{formation}}
- Line code: {{line_code}}
- Color: {{line_color}}

12. CLOSING SLOGAN:
- One poetic Chinese sentence

---

VISUAL QUALITY RULES:
- Sharp line art
- Clean composition
- High-end editorial infographic style
- Consistent lighting
- Strong hierarchy
- Readable layout

---

TRAIN PANEL RULE:
- Train must be in a separate product-style showcase card
- Must not overlap with route diagram or text panels
- Must look accurate and realistic (not toy-like)

---

FAIL-SAFE RULES:
- If layout becomes too crowded, reduce decorative elements first
- Never remove character or main panels
- Preserve readability over decoration
- Avoid malformed anatomy (hands, feet, face)
- Avoid distorted typography or unreadable text
- Avoid clutter or chaotic composition
poster.anti_failure:
STRICT SAFETY AND COMPOSITION CONTROLS:
- Character must remain anatomically correct (hands, legs, face)
- Panels must not overlap
- Text must remain readable or be simplified
- Do not generate pseudo-text or random characters
- Do not overload composition with decorations
- Train illustration must remain accurate and clean
- Maintain consistent lighting and color harmony
- Reduce complexity if necessary rather than breaking layout
- Keep character as dominant visual focus
poster.usage_tips: Recommended production pipeline: (1) generate poster base image using poster_mode with minimal text risk, (2) optionally use character_only_mode for reusable character assets, (3) apply external text rendering via Pillow/SVG/HTML for perfect typography control, (4) batch generate via JSON iteration system.

character_only.prompt_template:
Create a highly detailed anime-style character illustration for railway personification.

Theme: Personification of {{line_name_zh}} ({{line_name_en}}).

CHARACTER CORE:
- Gender: {{character_gender}}
- Personality: {{character_personality}}
- Role: {{character_role}}
- Age impression: {{character_age}}

VISUAL DESIGN:
- Outfit must reflect {{line_color}} railway identity
- Include line code {{line_code}}
- Railway-inspired accessories and modern transit fashion
- Clean full-body pose, centered composition

STYLE:
- High quality anime illustration
- Clean linework
- Soft cinematic lighting
- Premium character sheet style

BACKGROUND:
- Simple abstract railway / city motif
- No text, no panels, no infographic layout

CONSTRAINTS:
- No text in image
- No logos or watermarks
- Correct anatomy required (hands, feet, face)
- No cluttered composition
character_only.anti_failure: Keep composition simple. Focus only on character correctness and outfit design. Avoid complexity, avoid panel-like structures, avoid text generation.
character_only.usage_tips: Use this mode to generate reusable character assets for later compositing in external layout system.
